title: Select Another HMI Screen From The VISU_DATA Screen Drop-Down
summary: Use the VISU_DATA screen drop-down menu on the operator station HMI to directly select another screen to view.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when the operator is on the VISU_DATA screen and needs to directly navigate to another operator station HMI screen using the screen-selection drop-down menu.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to identify the full list of available screen names, because this source section does not enumerate the menu contents.

responsibilities: Navigate from the VISU_DATA screen using the screen-selection drop-down.
Verify that the selected screen displays.

safety_notes: This source-supported action is an HMI navigation task.
No lockout/tagout requirement is stated in the supplied source packet.
No production stop requirement is stated in the supplied source packet.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: VISU_DATA screen is open on the operator station HMI.

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen showing login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics.
Operator station display controls showing the screen-navigation buttons and drop-down menu used to access HMI screens.
Example operator station HMI screen that may be one of the destinations reached through screen navigation.
Example operator station HMI manual control screen showing a screen-selection drop-down.
Example operator station HMI machine data screen that may be selected from screen navigation.
Example operator station IO diagnostics screen showing another screen with direct screen-selection drop-down support.
Additional VISU_DATA screen reference showing operator statistics layout.

steps.title: Open the VISU_DATA screen
steps.purpose: Start from the documented HMI screen that contains the direct screen-selection drop-down.
steps.instruction: Go to the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is displayed on the operator station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station shows the VISU_DATA screen with its normal screen elements such as the informational banner, logged-in user display, and data sections.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen is not available or cannot be displayed on the operator station HMI.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen layout, including login controls, message banner, and tipper statistics.
Display controls and navigation methods associated with operator station HMI screens, including access to VISU_DATA.

stop_or_escalate_if: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be reached or displayed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including the informational banner, logged-in user ID, LOGIN/LOGOUT buttons, Tipper Stats, Process Status, RunTime Meters, screen selection drop-down, hospital send buttons, and PAUSE TIPPER.
The Next Screen drop-down menu, the buttons on the right side of the screen, and the physical buttons on the right side of the display navigate to the same screens. F5 maps to Visu_Data.

steps.title: Locate the screen-selection drop-down
steps.purpose: Identify the control used for direct navigation to another HMI screen.
steps.instruction: On the VISU_DATA screen, find the drop-down menu used to directly select the screen to view.
steps.expected_result: The screen-selection drop-down is identified on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down menu is visible and recognizable as the direct screen-selection control.
steps.failure_condition: The drop-down menu cannot be found on the VISU_DATA screen.

actions.label: Find drop-down menu
actions.exact_action: Locate the drop-down menu used to directly select the screen to view.

Drop-down menu and related navigation controls used for direct screen selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: The drop-down menu is not visible or cannot be identified on the VISU_DATA screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.
Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including the screen selection drop-down.

steps.title: Open the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Display the available screen choices for direct navigation.
steps.instruction: Open the screen-selection drop-down menu on the VISU_DATA screen.
steps.expected_result: The drop-down menu opens and presents available screen choices.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down opens normally and allows screen selection.
steps.failure_condition: The drop-down does not open or does not respond.

VISU_DATA screen location of the drop-down before selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: The drop-down menu does not open.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.
The Next Screen drop-down menu, the buttons on the right side of the screen, and the physical buttons on the right side of the display navigate to the same screens.

steps.title: Select the desired screen
steps.purpose: Navigate directly from VISU_DATA to the intended HMI screen.
steps.instruction: From the open drop-down menu, select the desired screen from the available list.
steps.expected_result: The selected screen is chosen from the drop-down menu.
steps.healthy_condition: A valid screen selection is made from the available list.
steps.failure_condition: The desired screen cannot be selected or the list does not present a usable choice.

actions.label: Choose destination screen
actions.exact_action: Select the desired screen from the available list.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_DATA screen as the starting point for direct screen selection.
Screen-navigation controls and documented examples of available operator station screens.
Example destination screen: Visu_MCP_Dual / operator station control panel.

Example destination screen: VISU_MDS.

stop_or_escalate_if: The desired screen cannot be selected.
The source section does not provide the full list of screen names and the operator cannot determine the correct destination.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.
The listed control mapping includes F5 to Visu_Data, F3 to Visu_MCP_Dual, F1 to Visu_ManControl, F2 to Visu_MDs, F4 to Visu_IO_Diag, and F6 to Visu_Alarm.

steps.title: Verify the selected screen displays
steps.purpose: Confirm that the HMI completed the requested navigation.
steps.instruction: Verify that the operator station HMI changes to the selected screen.
steps.expected_result: The operator station HMI displays the selected screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed HMI screen matches the operator's selection.
steps.failure_condition: The HMI remains on VISU_DATA, shows the wrong screen, or does not update after selection.

actions.label: Confirm screen change
actions.exact_action: Verify that the HMI changes to the selected screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The selected screen does not display.
The HMI does not change screens after selection.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

success_criteria: The operator station HMI displays the screen selected from the VISU_DATA drop-down menu.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen is accessible on the operator station HMI.
The screen-selection drop-down is visible and opens normally.
A desired screen can be selected from the available list.
The HMI changes to the selected screen after selection.
failure_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be opened.
The drop-down menu cannot be found.
The drop-down menu does not open.
The desired screen cannot be selected.
The selected screen does not display after selection.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the drop-down menu does not open or the selected screen does not display.
Escalate if the operator cannot determine the correct destination because the source section does not list the available screen names.

Additional VISU_DATA screen reference for operator data screen context.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

Figure 4-20 and Table 4-6 describe the Operator Station HMI Data Screen, including the informational banner, logged-in user ID, LOGIN/LOGOUT buttons, Tipper Stats, Process Status, RunTime Meters, screen selection drop-down, hospital send buttons, and PAUSE TIPPER.

The Next Screen drop-down menu, the buttons on the right side of the screen, and the physical buttons on the right side of the display navigate to the same screens. The listed control mapping includes F5 to Visu_Data, F3 to Visu_MCP_Dual, F1 to Visu_ManControl, F2 to Visu_MDs, F4 to Visu_IO_Diag, and F6 to Visu_Alarm.

missing_details: The supplied source section does not enumerate the full list of screen names available in the VISU_DATA drop-down menu.
The supplied source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The supplied source does not state whether production must be stopped.
The supplied source does not state any lockout/tagout requirement.
The supplied source does not provide detailed troubleshooting beyond escalating if the drop-down does not open or the selected screen does not display.
